emails.subject: Duke Energy deal #387571
emails.body: Duke Energy deal #387571 Please verify if Duke deal #387571 should be on HPL meter #1040. This purchase normally occurs on Centana meter #77455. Last month, Duke deal #351653 was changed due to the meter. Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks, Rebecca
